headline: Coinbase Enables 1M Businesses to Accept USDC Payments

article.title: Coinbase lets businesses accept USDC payments from AI agents
article.summary: The exchange also introduced AI trading tools and a developer kit as part of a broader push to build financial infrastructure for autonomous AI agents.

headline: Bitcoin Plunges Below $65K on Rising Oil

article.title: Bitcoin slides below $65K as Iran conflict fuels $100 oil and bond-yield surge
article.summary: Bitcoin price forecasts diverge as US-Iran war tensions fueled an ongoing oil and bond-market surge, while July Fed rate-hike odds neared 40%.

headline: Advent Taps Morgan Stanley to Sell $1B Tigre Stake

article.title: Advent to Hire Morgan Stanley to Sell Its Tigre Stake
article.summary: Advent hired Morgan Stanley to explore a potential sale of its stake in Tigre SA, a Brazilian manufacturer of pipe and hydraulic systems, according to people familiar with the matter.

headline: US Crude Exports Surge 20% Amid Global Conflict

article.title: Overseas Buyers In Hot Pursuit of US Crude as Wars Escalate
article.summary: An uptick in Asian and European demand for US crude is among the first signs of mounting concerns over adequate oil supplies amid multiplying geopolitical flashpoints.

article.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Bitcoinist.App Brings Private Mining Pools to iOS

headline: Goldman Sachs Backs Crypto Act Amid $2T Market

article.title: Goldman Sachs CEO Breaks With Wall Street to Back Crypto Clarity Act

article.title: Nasdaq-Listed Zhibao Wants a Bitcoin Treasury, Plans to Sell $220M in Stock for BTC
article.summary: A Shanghai-based insurance-tech company trading below $1 wants to build a bitcoin treasury by taking BTC directly as payment for new shares.

headline: MoonPay Adds 60M Discover Cards to Crypto Platform

article.title: MoonPay now accepts Discover Network cards for crypto purchases and sales in US
article.summary: The addition makes Discover the third major U.S. card network supported by MoonPay, alongside Visa and Mastercard.

headline: US Slaps 60 Nations With New Tariff Duties

article.summary: Administration pins new measures on forced labour probe after Supreme Court struck down blanket levies
